verses.text: Tu-in Topa in Moses kiangah
“Aaron tungah hih bangin gen in. Meivakte na koih ciangin, meivak sagihte in meivak khuam mai teng a taan' dingin koih in, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi
Aaron in tua bangmahin hih a, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, meivak khuam mai teng a taan' dingin meivakte a koih hi
Meivakkhuam a kibawlna zia in: Kham a kiseek hi a, a bul pan-a kipan a pakte dongin a kiseek ahi hi. Topa in Moses tungah a lahsa lim tawh kizui-in amah in meivakkhuam a bawl hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite lak panin Levi mi teng lakhia in la, amaute siangsak in

Amaute sian'sakna dingin hih bangin na hih ding hi: Sian'suahna tui amaute tungah theh in la, a pumpi khempeuh uh mulkiatna tawh amau kiatsak in la, a puante uh sawpin amau mah na kisiangsak tawm sak ding hi
Tua ciangin bawngtalno khat leh sathau leh annel a kibawl an tawh biakna amaute na lasak ding a, nangmah in khialhna hanga biakna dingin bawngtalno adang khat na la ding hi
Kikhopna buk mai-ah Levi mite paipihin, Israel mihon buppi na khawm ding hi
Topa' mai-ah Levi mite na paipih ciangin, Israel mite in Levi mite tungah a khut uh nga ding uh a
amaute in Topa' na a sep theihna dingun Aaron in Israel mite sung panin Levi mite Topa' mai-ah vei-a biakna-in a pia ding hi
Tua ciangin Levi mite in bawngtalte' lu tungah a khut uh nga ding uh hi. Levi mite-a' ding kilemna bawlsakna dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in khat, meihal biakna-in a khat, Topa' tungah na pia ding hi
“Aaron leh a tapate' mai-ah Levi mite na koih ding a, Topa' tungah amaute vei-a biakna-in na pia ding hi
Tua bangin Israel mite lak panin Levi mite na khenkhia ding a, Levi mite keima-a' hi ding uh hi
Amaute siangtho sakin vei-a biakna-in na piak khit ciangin kikhopna bukah na a sem dingin Levi mite pai ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite' lak panin kei' tungah amaute hong kipia khin hi. Israel mite' tacil khempeuh tangdingin keima-a' dingin amaute ka la khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite' lakah tacil khempeuh mihing hita leh ganhing hita leh keima-a' ahi hi
Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh ka thah ni-in keima-a' dingin amaute ka tuam koih a
Israel mite' lak panin tacil khempeuh tangdingin Levi mite ka la khin hi

Kikhopna bukah Israel mite-a' dingin na a sem ding leh, biakbuk mai-ah Israel mite a paikhak ciangin Israel mite' lakah gimna a tun'lohna dingin Israel mite-a' dingin kilemna a bawl dingin Israel mite' lak panin Aaron leh a tapate' tungah letsongin Levi mite ka pia khin hi,” a ci hi

Tua bangin Moses leh Aaron leh Israel mihonpite khempeuh in Levi mite' tungah a hih uh hi. Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Moses' tungah a thupiak khempeuh tawh kizui-in Israel mite in amaute tungah a hih uh hi

Israel mite, khialhna panin amaute kisiangthosak tawm uh a, a puante uh sawp uh hi. Aaron in vei-a biakna-in Topa' mai-ah amaute pia a, amaute sian'sakna dingin Aaron in amau-a' ding kilemna a bawlsak hi
Tua khit ciangin Aaron leh a tapate' omna kikhopna buk sungah na a sem dingin Levi mite a pai uh hi. Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Moses a thupiak bangin amaute in Levi mite' tungah a hih uh hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Hih pen Levi mite tawh a kisai thu ahi hi. Kum sawmnih leh kum nga pan a tungsiah a phate, kikhopna buk nasepna sungah na a sem dingin hong pai ding uh hi
Kum sawmnga a phak uha kipan nasepna panin amau kihemkhia-in na sem nawnlo ding uh hi
Ahih hangin kikhopna buk sungah a sanggamte uh huh ding a, amaute in a na taktak semlo ding uh hi. Tua bangin Levi mite' nasep ding na seh ding hi,” a ci hi.
